backend/main.mo: Motoko backend defining user, team, post, hiring, and endorsement types with maps for state and mixins for auth and blob storage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping features to affected frontend files, components, and test IDs with confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries describing purpose and behavior of each frontend file, mainly UI, routing, and profile setup components.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH color variables and dark-mode design tokens for the app.
frontend/index.html: Basic HTML shell loading the React application through main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Top-level React component managing authentication state, initialization flow, login routing, and performance markers.
frontend/src/components/AuthenticatedApp: Authenticated routing logic that initializes new users, enforces role selection, loads profiles, and routes to player or team dashboards.
frontend/src/components/CreatePostDialog: Dialog for creating a post with text and optional video upload, including validation and upload progress tracking.
frontend/src/components/DeploymentStatus: Displays deployment status with badges and detailed success or failure information including logs and URLs.
frontend/src/components/EditProfileDialo: Form dialog for editing a user profile, mapping UI selections to backend types and submitting updates.
frontend/src/components/EndorsementDialo: Dialog to submit predefined or custom endorsements for a player with validation and mutation handling.
frontend/src/components/FeedView.tsx: Renders the main feed with loading skeletons and readiness score metrics for the current user.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Provides the top navigation bar with view switching, user avatar menu, and logout handling using user profile data.
frontend/src/components/HiringRequiremen: Displays team hiring requirements and includes a dialog to create new requirements with game, role, and readiness inputs.
frontend/src/components/PerfDebugOverlay: Shows a performance diagnostics overlay when enabled via URL, polling and displaying timing markers.
frontend/src/components/PlayerProfileSet: Form for creating or updating a player profile, including username, game, role, level, and readiness settings.
frontend/src/components/PostCard.tsx: Renders a post with author info, timestamp, readiness score, text content, and optional video clip.
frontend/src/components/ProfileView.tsx: Displays a user profile with readiness stats, posts, endorsements, and editing options when viewing own profile.
frontend/src/components/ReadinessBreakdo: Modal displaying a breakdown of readiness score components with icons and point values.
frontend/src/components/TalentFinder.tsx: Talent search interface with filters, search input, and endorsement badges fetched from backend queries.
frontend/src/components/TeamHeader.tsx: Top navigation bar for team users with view switching, team avatar, and logout menu.
Home dashboard for teams showing welcome text and tiles linking to profile, hiring, and talent sections.
frontend/src/components/TeamProfileSetup: Form for creating a new team profile including name, games, description, requirements, and contact info.
View and editable form for an existing team profile with game selection and update handling.
frontend/src/components/TeamSearchView.t: Search UI for teams with filters for game, role, skill level, readiness score, and text query, fetching results via useSearchAllHiringRequirementsForPlayers.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches a backend actor tied to Internet Identity, refreshing dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides authentication context using Internet Identity, handling login, stored identities, and status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks wrapping actor methods for user, profile, feed, endorsements, and hiring requirement operations.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind base styles with a dark theme palette, custom scrollbar, and utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: App entry that sets up React Query and InternetIdentityProvider before rendering App.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login screen using Internet Identity with a styled UI and optional deployment status display.
frontend/src/pages/PlayerDashboard.tsx: Main dashboard switching between feed, profile, and team search views with a create-post button.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileSetupPage.tsx: Chooses player or team profile setup component based on UserType.
frontend/src/pages/RoleSelectionPage.tsx: Renders the role selection UI with player/team cards and handles submitting the chosen UserType via a mutation with error handling.
frontend/src/pages/TeamDashboard.tsx: Implements the team dashboard view switcher and records a performance marker on initial render.
frontend/src/utils/deploymentStatus.ts: Reads deployment-related environment variables and exposes helpers to get and check deployment status.
frontend/src/utils/perfDiagnostics.ts: Provides a lightweight performance marker utility to record timestamps and calculate durations.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utilities for reading URL parameters, persisting them in sessionStorage, and managing hash/query parsing.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind theme, colors, plugins, animations, and content paths for the frontend.
project_state.json: Describes the project's current features, authentication flow, role system, and supported user workflows.
